title: Simply Gems - Sapphire
description: Adds sapphire tools, ore & armor to your minecraft world!
body:
![Brief Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88160003524e7c9a8af56a03b19db2b4aceff8ae.png)


Adds Sapphire, Ore, Armor & Tools to your minecraft experience!

Found at -10 to -1 and 25 to 36

Hardness: 9 Resistance: 18

5 new tools, 1 new armor set, 2 sapphire ore variants.


1.0 Update coming: changes will include, proper tool settings to pickaxe to get drop, sword damage fix. Below 0 ore variant. Update 1.0 released.
